title: Avinu shebashamayim
html: Intro: Cm Bb/D Eb6 Eb6 Bb/F Cm Cm Bb/D Ab7M Ab7M Bb Cm Cm Bb6 Ab7M Fm7 Gm7 Cm7 Avinu Shebashamayim, Itkadesh shimcha Cm7 Bb/D Eb Fm7 Bb7 Tavô Malchutecha, ieasseh retsocha B° Ab7M Fm7 Gm7 Cm7 ( Fm7 Bb7 Eb7M Eb7M(#5) Ab7M Fm7 Gm7 Cm7 ) Kevad shamayim, ken baaretz Bbm7 C# Cm7 Et lechem chukeinu ten lanu hayon Bbm7 C# B° C7 Uslach lanu al ha va'einu C#7M C7 Bbm7 G#6 Ab7M G7 (Fm7 Eb6 Bb/D Ab/C G4 G7) Ken mor sheso le'chim gam anachanu laho te' im lanu Eb/G Fm7 (G4) G7 Vel'atevienu Ab7M G7 Lidei nissayion Ab7m Fm7 G7 Ki im haltsenu min Harah Fm7 Cm7 Fm7 Cm7 Ki leha hamamlaha, haguevurah ve hatiferet Fm7 Ab Leolmei ólamim G7 Amen Fm7 Cm7 C#7M Cm7 Ki leha hamamlaha, haguevurah ve hatiferet Ab7M Gm7 Leolmei ólamim F/A Fm7 Dm7(5-) C#7M C7M/9 Amen
